name: LengthValue.StringFormat
summary: Formatting to apply when creating a length value from a double.

enum_values.name: ExactProperFraction
enum_values.summary: If possible, use exact integer-fraction format (1.125 becomes 1-1/8).

enum_values.name: ExactImproperFraction
enum_values.summary: If possible, use exact fraction format (1.125 becomes 9/8).

enum_values.name: CleanDecimal
enum_values.summary: The value may be adjusted slightly to improve clarity (1.124999... becomes 1.125).

enum_values.name: CleanProperFraction
enum_values.summary: The value may be adjusted slightly to improve clarity (1.124999... becomes 1-1/8).

enum_values.name: CleanImproperFraction
enum_values.summary: The value may be adjusted slightly to improve clarity (1.124999... becomes 9/8).
